title: Boat Shaped Conference Table

specs.product_line: Zira Tables / Adaptabilities Tables / Anywhere Tables (boat-shape variant)

Multiple base styles: slab, tapered blade, arch, drum, panel, pedestal
Seated, counter, and standing height options available
Companion: media tables, lecterns, multimedia carts (Zira series)
specs.notes: Generic 'boat shape' SKU — Global offers it across Zira, Adaptabilities, and Anywhere lines. Verify specific BBI SKU and length with supplier.
